commit.message:
Initial commit: TPhaseNet seismic phase detection and picking system

Deep learning-based P/S wave phase detection and picking system
inspired by TPhaseNet (PhaseNet + Transformer).

- Model: 7-level U-Net encoder/decoder with Transformer blocks (34M params)
- Inference: mseed input -> preprocessing -> sliding window -> pick extraction
- SeisBench integration: pretrained PhaseNet/EQTransformer support
- Training: STEAD dataset loader, augmentation, weighted CE loss
- CLI: predict.py (inference), train.py (training)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: seismic-picker
repository.description: TPhaseNet: Deep learning-based seismic phase detection and P/S wave picking system (U-Net + Transformer)

commit.message:
Overhaul matching, scanning, and pricing pipeline

- Rewrite fuzzy_matcher: 2-layer approach (exact normalized title match +
  TF-IDF at 0.85 threshold) replacing single TF-IDF at 0.50. Eliminates
  false positive matches across platforms.
- Expand Polymarket fetching from 200 to 10k markets (100 pages x 100)
- Kalshi: use events API with_nested_markets for 33x faster fetching
- Kalshi orderbook: add retry with backoff on 429 rate limits
- Scanner: scan top 200 matches by score instead of all 4000+, reducing
  orderbook fetches from ~8500 to ~400 (scan time 2min -> 10s)
- Float prices throughout: support decimal cents (e.g. 2.9c, 93.2c)
  in models, orderbook, fees, and opportunity evaluation
- Batch match saving via executemany instead of per-row inserts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add NFS share management via ZFS sharenfs property (#6)

Adds a per-dataset NFS sharing dialog to the Datasets tab. Sharing is
managed through the ZFS sharenfs property (zfs set sharenfs=...) rather
than /etc/exports, making it cross-platform for Linux and FreeBSD.

- Dataset struct gains ShareNFS field; ListDatasets includes sharenfs column
- NFS button in dataset row lights up (accent colour) when sharenfs is active;
  tooltip shows the current options string
- setDatasetProps allows sharenfs in its allowed-property set and calls
  publishDatasets() on success for immediate SSE push to all clients
- zfs_dataset_set.yml extended with sharenfs var (set + inherit support)
- NFS dialog reads current sharenfs via GET /api/dataset-props and writes
  via PATCH /api/datasets; separate Share and Disable buttons
- Software check is OS-aware: probes exportfs on Linux, mountd on FreeBSD
- README: requirements table, install snippets, feature list, file map updated

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(btc): kill Time Stop — was exiting trades before settlement

Time Stop (loserMaxHoldSeconds=120) was the #1 exit reason.
Trades with MFE $15-24 were being cut at -$5 after 2 minutes.
MFE capture rate was -29.6% — $649 of potential profit turned into
-$192 actual because trades were exited before settlement.

Hardcoded to 0. Only exit now is Market Rollover (settlement).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4 <noreply@anthropic.com>

修复模型时长字段名 options -> fixed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

research: prove Five Color Theorem via Kempe chain argument (euler-polyhedral-formula-oq-01-oq-01) (#3329)

- Formalize Kempe chains using Equiv.swap for color transpositions
- Prove kempeSwap correctness with maximality-based boundary analysis
- Prove K₅ non-planarity as Five Color Theorem prerequisite
- Complete inductive proof structure (base case + degree ≤ 4/5 cases)
- 0 sorries, 4 axioms (Mathlib SimpleGraph API gaps)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ui): replace native drag hack with official Tauri data-tauri-drag-region

Remove ~120 lines of unsafe ObjC FFI (SumiDragView) that intercepted
mouse events for window dragging. Use the official Tauri 2 mechanism
instead: `data-tauri-drag-region` HTML attribute on the title bar spacer
elements, with `acceptFirstMouse` and `core:window:allow-start-dragging`
capability. Also fix all 38 svelte-check warnings (0 errors, 0 warnings).

fix: 코인 생성 위치 도로 레인과 일정하게 정렬 (#130)

1. halfWidth 계산 기준 변경
   - 기존: GetExtentsSize().X * 0.45 (장식 파트에 따라 청크마다 달라짐)
   - 수정: GameConstants.CHUNK.LENGTH * 0.45 (항상 36 studs로 고정)
   → 모든 청크에서 X 배치 범위가 일정하게 유지됨

2. SPREAD 패턴 Y 고정
   - 기존: 2.0 + 랜덤(0~4.0) → 높이가 제멋대로 분포
   - 수정: 항상 GROUND_Y = 2.0 (도로 표면 기준 일정 높이)

3. CORRIDOR 패턴 Y 고정
   - 기존: 2.5 + 랜덤(0~3.0) → 랜덤 부유
   - 수정: 항상 2.5 (도로 지상 레벨)

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs-only changes no longer trigger lint and test jobs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add memory consolidation: slow EMA of successful episode deltas

Brain-like synaptic consolidation: successful episodes blend into slow
memory (EMA), which initializes patches at episode start. Bad episodes
(avg_reward <= 0) don't consolidate. Like sleep consolidation — frequently
reinforced patterns persist, noise averages out.

Enable with --consolidation --ema-decay 0.95. Works with --act-hebbian
and --dense-hebbian.

commit.message:
feat: Pass active channel into plugin discovery + honor midtown_order [Midtown !2102] [Midtown !2103] (#1826)

* feat: Pass active channel into plugin directory discovery at runtime

Add channel parameter to discover_plugin_dirs() to scan channel-specific
plugin directories. At runtime, dispatch_workflow_event() discovers
channel-specific dirs and merges them into the running plugin daemon via
merge_plugin_dirs(), which accumulates dirs without losing dirs from
other channels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: Honor midtown_order field when loading AgentSkills plugins

Sort plugins by midtown_order before registering with pluggy. Plugins
are sorted descending by order so that lowest-order plugins register
last and execute first (pluggy LIFO). Bare .py files get default
order 1000. Python's stable sort preserves alphabetical ordering
for equal-order plugins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Address PR review feedback for plugin daemon

- P1: Call ensure_running() after merge_plugin_dirs() to prevent
  dropping the first workflow event when new channel-specific plugin
  directories are discovered (merge kills the daemon, but send_event
  needs it alive).
- P2: Add _reorder_plugins() to re-register all plugins in correct
  midtown_order after hot-reload, preserving LIFO execution order.
- Use graceful SIGTERM shutdown in merge_plugin_dirs() instead of
  SIGKILL, consistent with shutdown() from PR #1818.
- Add test for order preservation across hot-reload cycles.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: Add SIGTERM verification test for merge_plugin_dirs

Adds a test that proves merge_plugin_dirs sends SIGTERM (graceful)
rather than SIGKILL when restarting the daemon after discovering
new plugin directories. Mirrors the existing manager_shutdown_sends_sigterm
test pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
feat(scraping): extract hearing_date in PDF-link scrapers (#185) (#192)

Add hearing_date extraction for OC, Riverside, and SB scrapers so the
ingestion worker can create ruling rows from their documents.

- SB: parse MMDDYY from PDF filename (e.g. CVS24030426.pdf -> 03/04/26)
- OC: extract first "Month DD, YYYY" date from PDF text
- Riverside: extract date from "Tentative Rulings for {date}" in PDF text

Each scraper now overrides parse_document() to populate hearing_date
before event emission. New regression tests verify extraction against
all existing PDF fixtures.

Closes #185

モーダル完全対策: context.add_init_script()でCSS注入し全モーダルを非表示

モーダルを「閉じる」のではなく、ページ読み込み時にCSS/JSを自動注入して
モーダル・オーバーレイ・バックドロップを強制非表示にする。
MutationObserverで後から追加されるモーダルも即座に非表示。
body overflow lockも自動解除。

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: fix slow homepage load times (#1025)

* perf: fix slow homepage load times with SWR caching and pool warmup

follow graph: stale-while-revalidate pattern (TTL 60min, stale at 8min)
returns cached data immediately, schedules background re-warm when stale.
removes redundant login-time cache warming from auth paths.

track listing: cache anonymous first-page discovery feed in Redis (60s TTL)
with invalidation on upload, delete, and edit.

connection pool: warm one connection at startup to eliminate cold connect
penalty on first request after deploy.

- Move deferred imports in main.py to top level
- Update tests to use redis.exceptions.ConnectionError
